title: FastqMultiqcJobStateChange
description: Event detail payload for a MultiQC job state change in the fastq-manager service

id.description: The MultiQC job identifier (ULID with mqj prefix)

status.description: The current status of the MultiQC job

fastqIdList.description: List of FASTQ record IDs associated with this MultiQC job

stepsExecutionArn.description: The ARN of the Step Functions execution for this job

multiqcHtml.description: The MultiQC HTML report file storage reference

multiqcParquet.description: The MultiQC Parquet data file storage reference

FileStorageObject.description: A file storage object referencing an ingested file

s3Uri.description: The S3 URI of the file

storageClass.description: The S3 storage class of the file

sha256.description: The SHA-256 checksum of the file
